title: Episteme verdict
description: The factual result of one verify step, written to .episteme/verdict.json by verifying-against-contract. Enforces the typed-verdict spine: kind, reason, progress_delta, flags, invalidates_hypothesis are ALL required - a partial verdict is not a verdict.

kind.description: passed = prediction held; mismatch = oracle moved but not as predicted; failed = oracle red; noop = no effect; regression = a previously-green oracle went red.

progress_delta.description: +1 when a contract criterion's oracle flips red->green, -1 when a green one regresses, 0 otherwise. Moved ONLY by the oracle, never by 'the prediction matched'.
